name: kicad-happy
description: KiCad electronics design review. Parse schematics and PCB layouts, run EMC pre-compliance and SPICE simulation, extract structured specs from datasheet PDFs, source components from major distributors, and prep boards for fabrication. Catches real design bugs before you order.

interface.shortDescription: AI-powered KiCad schematic analysis, PCB review, EMC pre-compliance, SPICE simulation, datasheet extraction, BOM management, and fab prep.
interface.longDescription: Suite of skills for electronics design with KiCad 5–10. Structured Python analysis for schematics, PCB layouts, and Gerbers, plus EMC pre-compliance checks, SPICE simulation, schema-driven datasheet extraction with page-anchored evidence, component sourcing across DigiKey/Mouser/LCSC/element14, BOM management, and fab prep for JLCPCB and PCBWay. Catches real design bugs before you order boards.
